intended_use_full: Voxel Dosimetry is a software application for nuclear medicine. Based on user input, Voxel Dosimetry calculates a volumetric map of the distribution of absorbed radiation dose on the voxel level for patients who have been administered with radioisotopes. Voxel Dosimetry presents the results to the user and the result can be stored for future analysis.
ground_truth: manual segmentation, manual alignment methods, scientific computing language (for time activity curve integration), and state-of-the-art devices
other_metrics: Results met pre-set acceptance criteria for non-rigid alignment, semi-automatic organ segmentation, lesion segmentation, single time point dose calculation, GPU/CPU implementation comparison, and organ-based dose calculation.
